description_long: This is a medium-height, rectangular shelving unit constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring three open shelves and a solid top. The frame is simple and modern, with straight vertical supports at each corner and no visible decorative elements. The back of the unit is partially enclosed, with solid panels behind the lower two shelves, while the uppermost shelf is open at the back. The sides are fully enclosed, providing structural stability and a clean, boxy silhouette. The shelves are evenly spaced, offering ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for placement in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood shelving unit with three open shelves and a partially enclosed back, featuring a clean, modern design. The structure is sturdy and functional, ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves, solid sides, and a partially enclosed back.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile and the open spaces between shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels behind the lower two shelves and the open upper section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the vertical supports and shelf spacing.
